description:
Goal
Close the ReturnEvidence migration by deleting old naming, telemetry captures, outdated tests, and docs residue before the any/none audit starts.

Signal
- Grep checks for `FactKey::ReturnType`, `ReturnTypeCapture`, `return_type.defined`, `return_ty()` on activation slots, and docs that describe missing returns as `none` either return nothing or only intentional non-semantic names.
- `.agent/docs/semantic-fixpoint.md`, `.agent/docs/type-specialization.md`, `.agent/docs/type-world.md`, and `.agent/docs/type-naming.md` describe return evidence as the implemented model.
- Focused ReturnEvidence tests and the activation partition convergence tests pass under hard external timeouts.
- `cargo test --lib compiler2::semantic -- --nocapture` or the nearest focused compiler2 return-evidence suite passes without warnings.

Tactics
- Trust code/tests over prior docs; replace stale prose instead of adding caveats.
- Rename test helpers to evidence terminology rather than carrying both old and new names.
- If any old name survives for a legitimate ABI field, document why it is a value type, not a readiness fact.

Outro
No `ReturnType` fact residue, no old telemetry event name, no test helper that encodes the old model, no stale doc that says not-computed uses `none`, and no uncaptured blocker before `fz-rh2.18.7` starts.
title: Compiler2 ReturnEvidence closeout: delete ReturnType residue
